changeSet.author: AI-Assistant
changeSet.comment: Add Seed Virus Production page (Page 13) to Virology workflow template

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE name = 'Virology & Vaccine Development')

column.name: instructions
column.value: Select strain for vaccine - document seed virus batch ID and selection criteria

changeSet.author: AI-Assistant
changeSet.comment: Add Seed Virus Production page to existing Virology workflow instances
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page (id, notebook_id, title, page_order, instructions, is_template, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), n.id, 'Seed Virus Production', 13, 'Select strain for vaccine - document seed virus batch ID and selection criteria', false, now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.workflow_type = 'virology' AND n.is_template = false AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 13 );
